title: 『カレーにチョコを入れても隠し味』

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, in a room lined with trophies, a certain
racer is consulting a doctor about her condition.

text_block_list.name: Chief Physician
text_block_list.text:
Miss Ardan, it's too dangerous to increase your
training any more than you are doing now. If you
push yourself too far, your legs will—

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I don't care what happens to my legs.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I've always known that my time would be limited.
But I will neither accept nor begrudge my fate.
Instead...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But even if I'm just average, that doesn't mean I'm
going to give up on my dream!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I want to defy it with these glass legs of mine.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Even if I'm unable to obtain even a single trophy to rival those that gleam on these shelves, I don't want to remain in my sister's shadow. I want to be me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I don't want to give up on myself... on the person
I am right now.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
There she is! The young lady of the Mejiro family
is here!

text_block_list.name: Reporter B
text_block_list.text:
Ardan! Is it true that you've set your sights on the
Classic Triple Crown? That you'll be entering the
Derby?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...Yes. That's what I'm planning.

text_block_list.name: Reporter C
text_block_list.text:
Does that mean you won't be competing in the
Tiara tour like your sister, Mejiro Ramonu?

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
That's too bad! Your fans were looking forward to
seeing you compete in the Oka Sho and Japanese
Oaks, like Ramonu before you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure they were... But it is because my sister's
achievements were so radiant that I have decided
to aim elsewhere.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
That is why I, Mejiro Ardan, shall do everything I
can to shine at the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Even if the light I cast is no larger than a pinprick,
that's enough. Unlike my sister, my legs are weak,
but they're the only ones I have.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: When I win, I do not want to be seen as a sister or cousin of another famous racer. I want to leave my mark as myself.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: This is how I will fight my destiny.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That same day, atop the still-snowy
mountaintops, a certain Umamusume battles
against nature itself in an attempt to conquer her
own struggles.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Raaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text: You're so annoying! Just shut up, shrimp!

text_block_list.name: Young Boy
text_block_list.text: Sniffle... Waaaaah! Dad, Yaeno's being mean!

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text: Hmph. It's not my fault you're a weakling.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno, you are the weak one. Using violence to
control others is a sign of weakness.

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text: Huh? Who—

text_block_list.name: Young Yaeno
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
That's why as the head of the Kongo Yaegaki
style...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno's Grandfather
text_block_list.text:
I will take you, my granddaughter, under my wing.
Now, let us begin.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
As a child, I was constantly angry. I used my fists
to try to relieve that rage, but it never worked. It
felt like I was burning on the inside.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I isolated myself from others, and I knew my
parents were concerned about my future. But
still...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Grampa, you were the one who showed me the way.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I was so close to stepping off the right path, but
you patiently set me back on it. You helped settle
my heart.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Every time I tried to thank you, you would merely
smile and say, "Your growth is the best thanks I
care to receive."

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That's why I've decided to take on the Classic
Triple Crown and engage in the fierce battle that
determines the greatest Umamusume of all.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
That's where I will face the challenge to which all
racers aspire—the Derby. By defeating my rivals
there...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll be able to repay my gratitude toward you by
showing you how much I've grown!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while I'm working in my office, an
unexpected Umamusume walks through the door.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Pardon me, but I have come to inform you of
something.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry, but I must decline any invitations to
partner run with Chiyono O for the foreseeable
future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: ...At least until the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But, as shocking as that was to hear...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'm afraid I would prefer to avoid engaging in
partner runs with Chiyono O for now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki had stopped by earlier to tell me
the same thing.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Both of them said that? But why?
choice_data_list: Because they don't want to lose to you.
Because they don't want to lose to you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The two of them probably know that Sakura
Chiyono O is planning on racing in the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's why they want to avoid showing their
hands too early—to treat her as a rival rather than
a friendly training partner. After all...
choice_data_list: They want to win the Derby.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: The Derby...
choice_data_list: What about you? What do you want?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I-I don't want to lose! After all, the Derby...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: To me, the Derby is...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
An incredibly special dream passed on to me, an
ordinary racer, by an incredibly special person.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
O-of course, I know I'm not the only one to think
highly of the Derby. You only get one shot at this
race, so we all want to win.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But that just makes the dream Maruzen entrusted
to me all the more special.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Winning the Derby isn't a dream you bestow on
just anyone. That race isn't a goal you can speak
of lightly.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Maruzen's speed was incredible. I'm sure she
would've won the Derby if she'd been able to
enter it.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
But she had to give up on competing in it. I don't
know why she had to do that, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Since she gave everything to me, I have no choice
but to meet her expectations by claiming victory.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I've looked up to Maruzen for so long, and I'm
going use my victory to prove to her...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That if she had run in the Derby, she would have
won too.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Oh, the lights in the gym are on.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O stops in the middle of training
to look at the training gym.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Do you think Yaeno and Ardan are still in there,
training?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Honestly, I thought being rivals in the Classics
would be a bit more fun.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
That there wouldn't be any hard feelings once we
headed into the gates and ran that
once-in-a-lifetime race.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I thought everyone would praise and congratulate
the winner, just like they did in the races I
watched on TV as a kid.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
If I lose, I think I'll completely break down in
tears.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I won't be able to sincerely applaud for the
winner or praise her eloquently either.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Because that's how hard I'm holding on to this
wish... and how badly I want to win.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
I can't possibly lose this race, not when Maruzen
was the one who entrusted her dream to me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Chiyono O's declaration echoes with more
strength than I've ever heard her speak with
before.
